checklist.label: Study 90 min — phone in another room

turns.content: Hey — you committed to studying for 2 hours last night. Did you follow through?
mostly. got like 90 minutes in then just lost it
Okay. Before we talk about what went well — what actually got in the way? Not the surface reason.
kept checking my phone. like every 20 minutes I was just reaching for it
Why didn't you just put it in another room?
honestly didn't even think about it. it was just sitting there and I let it
That's the real blocker — not the phone, the default. You didn't decide to get distracted, you just never decided not to. Alright, what actually went well today?
got through the hardest lecture and didn't quit early. that's been a thing for me lately
That's real progress. Sitting through the hard stuff instead of bailing — that's the actual work. What's your minimum commitment for tomorrow?
90 minutes. and phone goes in the other room before I even sit down
Good. Stretch goal if you're locked in?
review my lecture notes before bed
That's the version of you that actually finishes the semester strong. You already know what to do — tonight you're making sure tomorrow you do it. 🔥
